x = 40

Number of females who booked tickets in bus A

= 
 × 0.65 × 28 × 40 = 312

Number of females who booked tickets in bus C

= 
 × 0.85 × 19 × 40 = 272

Desired difference = 312 – 272 = 40

Hence, the correct option is B.
